description:
Offered: Fall
The course provides a detailed examination of the structure and function of the human body on the cellular, tissue, and organ system levels. Cellular metabolism, histology, and the skeletal, muscular, nervous, endocrine systems and special senses are examined. Laboratory complements lecture topics.
Prerequisite(s): BIOL 1800 , BIOL 1900 , and CHEM 1300
Note: Credit is granted only for Biology 2004/2005 or Biology 1200/1300 or BIOL 2420.
